name: @totemsdk/txpow
description: TxPoW envelope serialization and proof-of-work mining for the Minima protocol

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.join(__dirname,'src','wasm','miner.wasm');const dst=p.join(__dirname,'dist','wasm','miner.wasm');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[@totemsdk/txpow] miner.wasm → dist/wasm/')}else{console.log('[@totemsdk/txpow] Note: miner.wasm not compiled — JS fallback only. Run npm run build:wasm with Emscripten to enable WASM acceleration.')}"
scripts.build:wasm: npm run compile:wasm && npm run build

author: Totem SDK
